/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/oj_server.dir/services/oj_server/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oj_server.dir/services/oj_server/routes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oj_server.dir/services/oj_server/judge_service.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oj_server.dir/services/oj_server/problem_repository.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oj_server.dir/services/oj_server/redis_client.cpp.o -o oj_server  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib liboj_judge_core.a /usr/local/lib/libredis++.so.1.3.15 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libhiredis.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libhiredis.so
